body:
### Bug description
Hi.
I want report bug which occurs in one of my project. As it is described in topic pylint detect object of class Animal created in context manager as an object of context manager class (SQLUnitOfWork) `src\api\webapp\animal.py:26:15: E1101: Instance of 'SQLUnitOfWork' has no 'as_dict' member (no-member)`. As a result it report my object does not have a method. 

Source code (full code you can find [here](https://github.com/Draqun/animal-api))

```python
    with SQLUnitOfWork(config) as uow:
        animal = Animal(**data).add_animal_to_db(uow)
        if not animal:
            return {'status': 'Incorrect values', 'values': body}, 405
        return animal.as_dict(), 201  # pylint: disable=no-member
```

### Command used

```shell
pylint --rcfile=.cicd/config/pylint src/
```


### Pylint output

```shell
************* Module src.api.webapp.animal
src\api\webapp\animal.py:25:15: E1101: Instance of 'SQLUnitOfWork' has no 'as_dict' member (no-member)

------------------------------------------------------------------
Your code has been rated at 9.74/10 (previous run: 9.74/10, +0.00)
```

### Expected behavior

This is false positive so It should never happen.

### Pylint version

```shell
$ pylint --version
pylint 2.10.2
astroid 2.7.2
Python 3.9.5 (tags/v3.9.5:0a7dcbd, May  3 2021, 17:27:52) [MSC v.1928 64 bit (AMD64)]
```

comments.body: Could you cleanup the issue, please ? Show the piece of code causing the problem and remove the configuration that is not relevant. It's impossible to read right now.
I hope now it is clear.

Not able to try to reproduce this because we need the definitions of `SQLUnitOfWork` and `Animal` just to get started. The link provided to full code is login-protected.

@Draqun could you update issue with full reproducible example?

Hi. 
I've updated link for the project in the first comment. Whole project can be found here: https://github.com/Draqun/animal-api
It is not big project, and you can easyli create environment and install dependencies using makefile.

Sorry for late answer by the way.
Let me know if you need something more.
Best regards

title: Variable created in context manager is detected as object of context variable class
